languages.text: "Ваша Светлость, появилась теория о произошедшем. Агенты династии провели исследование и обнаружили странный сигнал, который мы не можем расшифровать или дислоцировать. Однако он, предположительно, каким-то образом воздействует на нервную систему этих "Погонщиц", приводя их в ярость. Увы, пока что это все".

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, a theory has emerged about what caused this. The dynasty's agents have investigated and discovered a strange signal that we cannot decipher or locate. However, it seems to affect the nervous system of these 'Drovers' in some way, driving them into a rage. Alas, that is all we know for now."
languages.original_text: "Ваша Светлость, появилась теория о произошедшем. Агенты династии провели исследование и обнаружили странный сигнал, который мы не можем расшифровать или дислоцировать. Однако он, предположительно, каким-то образом воздействует на нервную систему этих "Погонщиц", приводя их в ярость. Увы, пока что это все".

traits.locale_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, a theory has emerged about what caused this. The dynasty's agents have investigated and discovered a strange signal that we cannot decipher or locate. However, it seems to affect the nervous system of these 'Drovers' in some way, driving them into a rage. Alas, that is all we know for now."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, a theory has emerged about what caused this. The dynasty's agents have investigated and discovered a strange signal that we cannot decipher or locate. However, it seems to affect the nervous system of these 'Drovers' in some way, driving them into a rage. Alas, that is all we know for now."

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, a theory has emerged about what caused this. The dynasty's agents have investigated and discovered a strange signal that we cannot decipher or locate. However, it seems to affect the nervous system of these 'Drovers' in some way, driving them into a rage. Alas, that is all we know for now."

languages.text: 「お方、この事態の原因について、ある説が浮上しました。王朝の手下は調査を行い、解読も位置特定もできない奇妙な信号を発見しました。しかし、この信号が「牛飼い」の神経系に何らかの影響を与え、怒り狂わせるようです。現時点では、これが全てです」
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, a theory has emerged about what caused this. The dynasty's agents have investigated and discovered a strange signal that we cannot decipher or locate. However, it seems to affect the nervous system of these 'Drovers' in some way, driving them into a rage. Alas, that is all we know for now."

traits.locale_text: 「お方、この事態の原因について、ある説が浮上しました。王朝の手下は調査を行い、解読も位置特定もできない奇妙な信号を発見しました。しかし、この信号が「牛飼い」の神経系に何らかの影響を与え、怒り狂わせるようです。現時点では、これが全てです。」

languages.text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, ha surgido una teoría sobre las causas de este fenómeno. Los agentes de la dinastía han investigado y han descubierto una extraña señal que somos incapaces de descifrar y de localizar. Parece afectar a los sistemas nerviosos de estos "Pastores" para provocarles una furia insaciable. Por desgracia, eso es todo lo que sabemos por ahora».
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, a theory has emerged about what caused this. The dynasty's agents have investigated and discovered a strange signal that we cannot decipher or locate. However, it seems to affect the nervous system of these 'Drovers' in some way, driving them into a rage. Alas, that is all we know for now."

traits.locale_text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, ha surgido una teoría sobre las causas de este fenómeno. Los agentes de la dinastía han investigado y han descubierto una extraña señal que somos incapaces de descifrar y de localizar. Parece afectar a los sistemas nerviosos de estos "Pastores" para provocarles una furia insaciable. Por desgracia, eso es todo lo que sabemos por ahora».

languages.text: “大人，关于此次事件的起因，我们提出了一种理论。王朝特工侦测到一种无法解析或定位的异常信号，似乎能直接刺激拒生花的神经系统并诱发其狂暴。遗憾的是，目前我们所知仅止于此。”
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, a theory has emerged about what caused this. The dynasty's agents have investigated and discovered a strange signal that we cannot decipher or locate. However, it seems to affect the nervous system of these 'Drovers' in some way, driving them into a rage. Alas, that is all we know for now."

traits.locale_text: “大人，关于此次事件的起因，我们提出了一种理论。王朝特工侦测到一种无法解析或定位的异常信号，似乎能直接刺激拒生花的神经系统并诱发其狂暴。遗憾的是，目前我们所知仅止于此。”

languages.text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, es gibt eine Theorie, was passiert sein könnte. Die Agenten der Dynastie haben ein seltsames Signal aufgefangen, das wir nicht entschlüsseln oder orten können. Allerdings scheint es das Nervensystem dieser 'Treiber' zu beeinflussen und sie in Wut zu versetzen. Mehr wissen wir im Moment leider nicht."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, a theory has emerged about what caused this. The dynasty's agents have investigated and discovered a strange signal that we cannot decipher or locate. However, it seems to affect the nervous system of these 'Drovers' in some way, driving them into a rage. Alas, that is all we know for now."

traits.locale_text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, es gibt eine Theorie, was passiert sein könnte. Die Agenten der Dynastie haben ein seltsames Signal aufgefangen, das wir nicht entschlüsseln oder orten können. Allerdings scheint es das Nervensystem dieser 'Treiber' zu beeinflussen und sie in Wut zu versetzen. Mehr wissen wir im Moment leider nicht."

languages.text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, buna neyin sebep olduğu hakkında bir teori ortaya çıktı. Hanedanlık ajanları araştırdı ve şifresini çözemediğimiz veya yerini tespit edemediğimiz garip bir sinyal keşfetti. Görünüşe göre bu, Çobanların sinir sistemini bir şekilde etkileyerek onları öfkeye sürüklüyormuş. Ne yazık ki şimdilik bildiğimiz tek şey bu."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, a theory has emerged about what caused this. The dynasty's agents have investigated and discovered a strange signal that we cannot decipher or locate. However, it seems to affect the nervous system of these 'Drovers' in some way, driving them into a rage. Alas, that is all we know for now."

traits.locale_text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, buna neyin sebep olduğu hakkında bir teori ortaya çıktı. Hanedanlık ajanları araştırdı ve şifresini çözemediğimiz veya yerini tespit edemediğimiz garip bir sinyal keşfetti. Görünüşe göre bu, Çobanların sinir sistemini bir şekilde etkileyerek onları öfkeye sürüklüyormuş. Ne yazık ki şimdilik bildiğimiz tek şey bu."

languages.text: « Votre Seigneurie, nous avons enfin une piste sur la cause des récentes attaques. Les agents de la dynastie ont enquêté et découvert un étrange signal que nous ne parvenons ni à déchiffrer ni à localiser. Toutefois, ce signal semble affecter le système nerveux des "Chasseurs" et être à l'origine de leur rage. Hélas, nous n'en savons pas plus pour le moment. »
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, a theory has emerged about what caused this. The dynasty's agents have investigated and discovered a strange signal that we cannot decipher or locate. However, it seems to affect the nervous system of these 'Drovers' in some way, driving them into a rage. Alas, that is all we know for now."

traits.locale_text: « Votre Seigneurie, nous avons enfin une piste sur la cause des récentes attaques. Les agents de la dynastie ont enquêté et découvert un étrange signal que nous ne parvenons ni à déchiffrer ni à localiser. Toutefois, ce signal semble affecter le système nerveux des "Chasseurs" et être à l'origine de leur rage. Hélas, nous n'en savons pas plus pour le moment. »
